patch:
diff --git a/asgiref/sync.py b/asgiref/sync.py
index 54496ef..d7442c8 100644
--- a/asgiref/sync.py
+++ b/asgiref/sync.py
@@ -158,9 +158,7 @@ class AsyncToSync(Generic[_P, _R]):
         try:
             self.main_event_loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
         except RuntimeError:
-            # There's no event loop in this thread.
-            pass
-
+            self.main_event_loop = main_event_loop
     def __call__(self, *args: _P.args, **kwargs: _P.kwargs) -> _R:
         __traceback_hide__ = True  # noqa: F841
 
diff --git a/asgiref/timeout.py b/asgiref/timeout.py
index fd5381d..72452ec 100644
--- a/asgiref/timeout.py
+++ b/asgiref/timeout.py
@@ -76,11 +76,13 @@ class timeout:
 
     @property
     def remaining(self) -> Optional[float]:
-        if self._cancel_at is not None:
-            return max(self._cancel_at - self._loop.time(), 0.0)
-        else:
+        if self._timeout is None:
             return None
-
+        if self._cancelled:
+            return 0.0
+        if self._cancel_at is None:
+            return self._timeout
+        return max(0.0, self._cancel_at - self._loop.time())
     def _do_enter(self) -> "timeout":
         # Support Tornado 5- without timeout
         # Details: https://github.com/python/asyncio/issues/392
